generated_from: okf/customer-sales-release/jvto (existing release) + jvto-itinerary-core generated intelligence (read-only projection)
baseline_inclusions: meals as stated in the itinerary
route_sequence_policy: Customer-facing route_sequence is derived from the published itinerary (day_titles); operational route legs + feasibility are owned by jvto-itinerary-core (operational_route_ref). Bootstrap never asserts a directional route leg.
principle: Write a reusable module once; each package stores only what changes (variation).
